series_metadata.series_title: Memoranda regarding the maximum tax amount for the excise tax on premium cigars
series_metadata.series_description: Memoranda (O.R.C. 5743.01(R)) identifying the tax adjustment factor and the maximum tax amount for the excise tax levied on a premium cigar and any spreadsheets, data, and/or calculations identifying the tax adjustment factor and/or maximum tax amount.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value. If scanned, . ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
